title: Director of Program Management
jd_text:
Company Description

CMP Digital Infrastructure specializes in delivering end-to-end solutions for data center projects, encompassing land strategy, site readiness, power strategy, grid connections, and development management. Beyond construction, the company excels in implementing advanced technology stacks within data center environments, including GPU, accelerated compute, and cloud stack integration. Trusted for its seamless delivery, accountability, and efficiency, CMP Digital Infrastructure is recognized as a reliable partner to bring data center projects from conception to completion. The team leverages innovation and expertise to ensure projects are delivered with precision and commercial success.

Role Description

We are seeking a Director of Program Management for a full-time, on-site role based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The Director will oversee large-scale programs, ensuring deliverables meet client expectations while adhering to timelines, budgets, and quality standards. This role involves leading cross-functional teams, devising and executing strategic plans, managing project portfolios, and maintaining seamless communication across stakeholders to drive program success.

Qualifications

Must hold a Masters or MBA in Project or Programme Delivery.

Must be a PMP Certification holder with 10 years experience in Data Centre Delivery

Proven expertise in Program Management and Project Management to oversee large-scale construction and technology driven initiatives from start to finish

Strong Team Leadership abilities to inspire, guide, and manage cross-functional teams effectively

Strong Staekholder management

Experience in Strategic Planning for developing and executing long-term goals

Proficiency in Budgeting to manage financial resources effectively for project success

Exceptional problem-solving, communication, and decision-making skills
